new_jobs.title: Business Developer & Market Linkage Officer
new_jobs.company: (CHA), Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance موسسه همکاری
new_jobs.description:
About (CHA), Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance موسسه همکاری
Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance (CHA) is a non-governmental, non-profitable, and non-political Afghan NGO, working since 1987 mainly in agriculture, health, education, and infrastructure sectors in more vulnerable areas of the country. CHA is working through the implementation of Emergency, rehabilitation, and development projects for emergency aid for war, famine, and natural disaster-affected families in the field, to assist with the rehabilitation of rural and urban life, and to work with communities for sustainable development in Afghanistan.
Core Commitments and Expectations from Candidates:
CHA is dedicated to creating an environment where all staff members are committed to our core values and principles. We believe that our employees play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity and excellence of our organization. Therefore, we have outlined the following core commitments and expectations that all candidates must adhere to:
Adherence to CHA's Policies and Procedures: All candidates must adhere to CHA's policies and procedures, these guidelines are designed to ensure a safe, fair, and efficient working environment. Compliance with these policies is fundamental to maintaining the standards and quality of our operation
Protection from Sexual Exploitation and Abuse (PSEA): CHA has zero tolerance for sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and abuse. All candidates, employees, associates, and partners must comply with the PSEA policy.
Ethical Conduct and Integrity: Candidates are expected to maintain high standards of ethical conduct and integrity in all their professional dealings. This includes avoiding conflicts of interest, maintaining confidentiality, and adhering to anti-fraud and anti-corruption guidelines​​.
Commitment to Non-Discrimination and Diversity: CHA is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment. Candidates must respect and promote diversity and non-discrimination based on race, gender, age, or any other protected characteristic​​.
Child Protection: Candidates must adhere to the Child Protection Policy, ensuring the safety and well-being of children in all CHA activities.
Environmental and Social Safeguards: Candidate must follow CHA's Environmental and Social Safeguard Policy to minimize environmental impact and ensure sustainable practices in all projects and operations​​.
Confidentiality and Data Protection: Candidates are required to maintain the confidentiality of all CHA data and information.
All selected candidates will be expected to adhere to these standards and principles. To ensure compliance, candidates will undergo rigorous reference and background checks. These checks will include the verification of academic credentials and employment history. Selected candidates may also be required to provide additional information to facilitate these checks.
By joining CHA, candidates commit to these core values and contribute to our mission of providing humanitarian assistance with the highest level of integrity and professionalism. We look forward to welcoming dedicated individuals who share our commitment to making a positive impact.

Job Description
• Develop and regularly update work plans and implementation schedules for all livelihood-related projects.
• Lead and oversee the execution of MSME development, carpet weaving, value chain strengthening, teacher training, computer learning, and cash-for-work initiatives.
• Provide technical expertise, guidance, and mentoring to project teams, trainers, and implementing partners.
• Coordinate closely with provincial teams, government departments, local authorities, and community leaders, while maintaining strong collaboration with UNHCR focal points on planning, reporting, and monitoring.
• Monitor project activities to ensure quality, effectiveness, sustainability, and timely delivery.
• Collect, analyze, and document data, success stories, and beneficiary feedback for inclusion in reports.
• Prepare and submit high-quality progress reports (weekly, monthly, and quarterly) in line with project manager and donor (UNHCR) requirements.
• Strengthen the capacity of field staff through technical support and ongoing mentoring.
• Conduct other relevant tasks and duties

Job Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Agriculture, and business administration(Master’s degree strongly preferred).
• Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in implementing livelihood programs, particularly MSME and agriculture-focused initiatives.
• Preference will be given to candidates from the relevant provinces.
• Demonstrated experience working with returnees, IDPs, and vulnerable groups in complex and challenging contexts.
• Strong technical knowledge of MSME development, carpet weaving, value chain strengthening, teacher training, computer literacy, and cash-for-work programming.
• Prior experience with UNHCR-funded projects or other international donor-funded programs is highly desirable.
• Proficiency in English, Dari, and Pashto.
• Excellent communication, coordination, and report-writing skills.
• Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving abilities.
• Willingness and ability to travel regularly to field sites across the northern provinces.

Submission Guideline
Interested and qualified candidates should send us their information using the link below.
https://manage.cha-net.org/jobs/69f1f0d807ef81075da21324
for more information please contact to this number: 0729128571

Submission Email
Please use the above link in the Submission Guideline section

details.Organization: (CHA), Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance موسسه همکاری

new_jobs.title: IT Services Management Assistant
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The facility of technical support to Branches and HO users by performing remote through Telephone, Ticketing system, and Onsite support.

Duties and Responsibilities
Providing first-level support contact and conveying IT solutions to the branches and HO department’s inquiries and issues.
Properly escalate unresolved queries to the next level of IT support/Unit.
Track, Route, and redirect problems to correct IT resources.
Ensure to Keep updating users/requesters’ Tickets on the Ticketing system.
Walk users through problem-solving processes.
Follow up with users/requesters to provide feedback and see problems through a proper resolution.
Utilize better user service skills and exceed customer’s/requester’s expectations.
Ensure proper recording, documentation, and closures of the reports are in place.
Any other identical tasks assigned by the respective supervisor/s.

Job Requirements
A university degree in IT field or Computer Sciences fields.
A minimum of 2 years’ experience in IT troubleshooting or functional role.
Ability to communicate, written and orally, in English and Dari/Pashto.
Ability to work in a systematic and well-organized manner, with technical skills.
Ability to have IT Troubleshooting, Computer Configurations, and Hardware repair skills.
Ability to Travel in Fields/Provinces where FMFB operates.

Submission Guidelines
If you meet the above requirements, we are encouraging you to apply for this position. Please send us your CV along with a cover letter via email at ( vacancies@fmfb.com.af ).
Please make sure that your email includes the vacancy ID as the subject line.
Note that, only the candidates who are meeting the requirements of the position will be shortlisted.
For more information, Please visit our website: https://www.fmfb.com.af/jobs/it-services-management-assistant/

new_jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
new_jobs.category: Graphic Design, Project Design, Software Development
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Arfoon.com is looking for a strategic and user-focused UI/UX Designer to join our product team. As a growing software company building solutions in accounting, health, and enterprise systems, we need a designer who thinks beyond visuals—someone who understands users, simplifies complexity, and drives product usability.

Duties and Responsibilities
Design intuitive and scalable user experiences for web and mobile applications
Create wireframes, user flows, and interactive prototypes
Translate business requirements into clean, user-centered designs
Collaborate closely with developers and product stakeholders
Improve usability and consistency across all Arfoon products
Conduct basic user research and iterate based on feedback
Maintain and evolve design systems and UI standards

Job Requirements
Strong proficiency in English communication and online research
Expertise in UI/UX tools such as Figma (preferred), Adobe XD, or Sketch
Deep understanding of UX principles, usability, and interaction design
Ability to create wireframes, prototypes, and user journeys
Strong attention to detail and structured design thinking
Experience working with developers and handing off designs effectively
Familiarity with design systems and component-based design
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS (bonus, not required)

Submission Guidelines
Go to the following link:
https://forms.gle/WUm4QD7TasNMwLqw7
And fill the form

details.Functional Area: Graphic Design, Project Design, Software Development

expiring_today.title: Country IT & Business Solutions Officer
expiring_today.description: Role Summary The IT & Business Solutions Officer (Officer) is responsible for overseeing and managing all aspects of IT operations in a country where Women for Women International operates. This role requires a strong technical background, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work independently while collaborating with cross-functional teams. The Officer will ensure the smooth functioning of all IT systems, infrastructure, and services in the country, aligning them with the overall Global IT strategy and organizational objectives. Additionally, the Officer will play a crucial role in improving business processes, increasing efficiencies, providing regular applications and information security training, successfully implementing initiatives directed from the Global IT team, leading both local and global projects, contributing to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans, and ensuring compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable laws in the country. Duties and Responsibilities Engagement Internal Relations Collaborate closely with the Admin Coordinator and Global IT team to align country-level IT operations with organizational strategies. Serve as the primary IT focal point for all departments within the Afghanistan Country Office, ensuring smooth communication and coordination. Work cross-functionally with Program, Finance, Administration, and Operations teams to identify business process improvements and technology-driven efficiencies. Provide IT advice and guidance to senior leadership and staff, fostering a culture of digital literacy and security awareness. External Relations Manage relationships with local IT vendors, service providers, and consultants, ensuring compliance with organizational standards and service-level agreements. Liaise with internet service providers, equipment suppliers, and external technical support as required. Delivery IT Infrastructure Management : Manage and maintain the IT infrastructure in the country, including network devices, storage systems, and telecommunications equipment. Ensure that the infrastructure is secure, scalable, and optimized for efficient operations. Systems Administration : Administer and support the country office's computer systems, including operating systems, software applications, and user accounts following the standards and procedures set by Global IT. Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement necessary upgrades or patches. Technical/Helpdesk Support : Provide technical support and assistance to end-users in the country, addressing hardware and software problems, network connectivity issues, and other IT-related queries. Resolve support requests in a timely manner to minimize downtime and disruptions and escalate requests to Global IT promptly when needed. Utilize Global IT's ticketing system to track and manage support requests, ensuring efficient communication and documentation. Network and Connectivity : Manage the local network infrastructure, including routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points. Ensure reliable connectivity within the office and to the Internet, implementing necessary security measures to protect data and systems. IT Security and Training : Implement and enforce IT security policies and procedures in accordance with the organization's standards. Regularly assess and monitor the country office's IT security posture, identifying vulnerabilities and recommending appropriate measures to mitigate risks. Conduct regular applications and information security training for all users, with a specific focus on data protection and maximizing the use of available systems. IT Procurement and Vendor Management: Collaborate with the Global IT team and local stakeholders to identify IT needs and procure necessary hardware, software, and services for the country. Manage vendor relationships and contracts, ensuring compliance with service level agreements. Business Process Improvement: Work closely with other teams in the country office to identify areas for process improvement and increased efficiency. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and provide IT solutions that streamline operations. Act as a consultant and advisor on IT-related matters, helping teams successfully implement new initiatives directed by the Global IT team. Lead both local and global projects and contribute to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans. Backup and Disaster Recovery: Ensure information across devices and systems is properly backed up. Develop and maintain a country’s disaster recovery plan to ensure business continuity in various crisis scenarios. Regularly test and validate these plans' effectiveness, making necessary improvements to ensure business continuity in case of disruptions or outages. Documentation and Reporting: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation of IT systems and assets, processes, and configurations in the country office. Prepare regular reports on IT operations, including performance metrics, incident trends, and project updates for monthly management review. Utilize Global IT's knowledge management system to document changes and create help materials for users. Compliance with GDPR and Applicable Laws : Ensure compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable data protection laws in the country. Implement measures to safeguard personal data and privacy rights. Conduct regular audits and assessments to verify compliance and provide reports to the appropriate stakeholders. Business Process Improvement: Work closely with other teams in the country office to identify areas for process improvement and increased efficiency. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and provide IT solutions that streamline operations. Act as a consultant and advisor on IT-related matters, helping teams successfully implement new initiatives directed by the Global IT team. Lead both local and global projects and contribute to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans. Job Requirements Job Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field. Proven experience in IT operations, infrastructure management, and technical support (3+ years preferred). Strong knowledge of networking principles, systems administration, and IT security. Familiarity with relevant technologies, such as Windows/Mac, Android and iOS operating systems, virtualization, cloud services, and enterprise applications. Certifications in relevant areas (e.g., CCNA, Meraki, MCSA, ITIL) are a plus. Ability to work independently and collaboratively as part of a team. Fluent written and verbal Dari, Pashto language skills; please expect written fluency testing. Fluent written and verbal English language skills Willing and able to travel to sub-offices as needed as well as travel internationally. Demonstrated ability to take decisions proactively , work autonomously, and solicit team and leadership support when appropriate. Attention to details, Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, strong use of logic and creativity . Impeccable integrity. Demonstrated ability to navigate Afghanistan’s laws and regulations, and to effectively, respectfully , responsibly, and ethically manage contextual and extraordinary complexities. Meticulous organizational and time-management skills; able to prioritize and manage order of operations within multiple projects, directing and maximizing team inputs while: proactively supporting team wellbeing. Committed to progress in the workplace, including progress in equity for all , diversity, inclusion, and belonging. Working Conditions: This position typically operates in an office environment. Occasional overtime may be required to meet deadlines or complete projects. Submission Guidelines Please clearly mention the Job Title and Vacancy Number in the subject line of your email. We appreciate your interest in joining our team.

details.Contract Duration: Full-time, Regular with possibility of extension
details.Years of Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of progressive experience in operations management within NGO, INGO, UN, or similar environments, including substantial experience in Afghanistan.

expiring_soon.title: Business Opportunity Developer / Entrepreneur in Residence
expiring_soon.description:
About Omar Kheyaam Sina Group – Logistics (OKS)
OKS Group Logistics is a fully Afghan-owned and registered private company established in 2007 in Kabul, Afghanistan. With over 17 years of experience in logistics, supply chain management, procurement, transportation, and automotive spare parts distribution, the company has built a strong operational presence across Kabul and multiple provinces.
Serving private enterprises and institutional clients, OKS delivers reliable, timely, and cost-effective solutions through structured operational systems, established procurement networks, and professional management practices.
As part of its strategic growth and expansion into new local and international business sectors, OKS Group Logistics is strengthening its strategic planning and venture development capacity. The company is committed to identifying sustainable investment opportunities, developing scalable business models, and expanding into high-potential markets beyond its current core operations.

Job Description
The Mission:
We are looking for an entrepreneurial-minded professional who can identify and develop new business opportunities in the local market and scale them toward international markets.
This role is not about writing business plans. Instead, we seek someone who can think strategically, recognize market gaps, and develop profitable business ideas that can grow locally and eventually expand beyond Afghanistan.
The selected candidate will work closely with company leadership to propose new ventures, evaluate their potential, and help launch viable businesses. The company is willing to invest directly in strong and scalable business ideas.

Job Requirements
Key Deliverables:
- Identify new business opportunities and market gaps in the local market
- Develop innovative business ideas with strong growth potential
- Analyze feasibility, market demand, and competition
- Design strategies to expand successful businesses into regional and international markets
- Present new venture concepts to company leadership
- Support the development and launch of approved ventures
- Monitor market trends and identify long-term growth opportunities
We Require Proof of Success (Not Just Experience)
• Strong portfolio with at least 3 business plans personally developed that resulted in:
– A funded startup or business venture, OR
– Successful internal approval and implementation, OR
– Securing a loan, investor, or financial support
• Strong financial capability in forecasting, budgeting, and building solid financial models in Excel
• Clear understanding of viable sectors in Afghanistan such as logistics, trade, agriculture, manufacturing, services, and emerging markets
• Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or related field (MBA is an advantage)
• Good English communication skills for preparing professional business documents and presentations
• Strong analytical mindset with the ability to evaluate ideas realistically and focus on high-return opportunities
What We Offer
• Result Base (negotiable based on proven ability)
• Performance-based incentives for each approved and implemented business plan
• Direct company investment in selected and approved business ideas
• A central strategic role with direct contribution to company growth and expansion
• Opportunity to turn ideas into real, operating businesses with measurable results and international growth potential

Submission Guidelines
To Apply – Demonstrate Your Skill
Send the following to [Your Email Address] with the subject line:
“OKS-BPA-2026-02 [Your Name]”
1) Your updated CV
2) A 1–2 page sample executive summary for a realistic business opportunity in Afghanistan (Important)
3) A short list describing 3 business plans you have developed and their outcomes (e.g., investment secured, business launched, project implemented) (Important)
Only complete applications will be reviewed. We are looking for a results-driven professional who can transform ideas into practical, profitable ventures.

details.Education: Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or related field (MBA is an advantage)

expiring_soon.title: Electrical / ICT Engineer
expiring_soon.description:
About Hewad Behram Logistics & Construction Company
Hewad Bahram Group (HBG) is a dynamic conglomerate comprising Hewad Bahram Logistics & Construction Company (HBLCC) and Hewad Bahram Research & Consulting Services (HBRC). Established in 2010, HBG is a leading provider of innovative logistics, construction, research, and consulting solutions in Afghanistan. Headquartered in Kabul, with a nationwide presence, HBLCC specializes in cost-effective construction services and logistics, while HBRC offers tailored research and consultancy expertise. Our commitment to client satisfaction and excellence drives us to deliver quality services tailored to meet your specific needs.
At Hewad Bahram Group, our dedication to excellence and client satisfaction remains unwavering. Whether you require support in construction, logistics, procurement, or strategic consultancy, HBG is poised to be your trusted partner in achieving your objectives.

Job Description
Hewad Bahram Logistics and Construction Company (HBLCC) is seeking to hire a qualified and experienced Electrical Engineer to support the planning, design, supervision, and implementation of electrical engineering works related to building construction projects, including Information and Communication Technology (ICT) systems integration. The selected candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all electrical and ICT systems are designed and executed in compliance with technical standards, project specifications, and safety regulations.
The Electrical Engineer will play a key role in the successful delivery of projects by providing technical expertise in electrical installations, ICT infrastructure, quality assurance, and coordination with project teams and stakeholders.

Job Requirements
1. Area of Experience Required
Electrical Engineering with proven experience in ICT systems related to building infrastructure.
2. Key Responsibilities
The Electrical Engineer shall be responsible for, but not limited to, the following:
Design, review, and supervise electrical systems for building construction projects including power distribution, lighting, grounding, fire alarm, and low-current systems.
Design, review, and supervise ICT systems including structured cabling, data networks, CCTV, access control, public address systems, intercom systems, and related communication infrastructure.
Prepare technical drawings, BOQs, specifications, and cost estimates for electrical and ICT works.
Ensure compliance with national and international electrical and ICT codes, standards, and project requirements.

Submission Guideline
Applications should be submitted via email to: hr.hblcc2015@gmail.com
Please mention the Vacancy Number and your Full Name in the subject line of the email.
Submission of educational documents is mandatory. Incomplete applications without academic certificates will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Submission Email
hr.hblcc2015@gmail.com

details.Experience: Minimum 5 years of position-specific experience in Electrical Engineering, particularly in building-related electrical systems, ICT infrastructure, and construction projects.
details.Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognized university.
details.Years of Experience: Minimum 5 years of position-specific experience in Electrical Engineering, particularly in building-related electrical systems, ICT infrastructure, and construction projects.

expiring_soon.title: Full Stack Developer (Re Announced)
expiring_soon.description:
About Baheer Group of Companies (BGC)
Baheer Group (BG) is a prominent manufacturer and provider of high-quality papers and paper products, offering premium solutions in Papers, Packaging, Printing, Mines & Energy, and supplying state-of-the-art Printing Machineries. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our diversified portfolio, which caters to both domestic and international markets. Backed by an extensive Group of Companies, BG consistently surpasses industry standards, specializing in customized products tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.

Job Description
We are seeking an experienced Full stack developer to join our team. This role is suited for a developer who has worked on production systems, understands modern development workflows, and can contribute effectively to both backend and frontend development in a professional environment.
The ideal candidate is comfortable working with established systems, writing high-quality code, and collaborating with other engineers to deliver reliable and scalable software solutions.
Specific Responsibilities:
Design, develop, and maintain web applications using Laravel on the backend and React (TypeScript, React Query) on the frontend
Build and maintain clean, scalable, and maintainable backend services and APIs
Develop user-facing features using modern frontend practices
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Review code, provide constructive feedback, and help maintain high engineering standards
Optimize application performance, database queries, and system reliability
Work with Git and GitHub in a collaborative, team-based workflow
Use Docker for development, testing, and deployment environments
Participate in system improvements, refactoring, and technical decision-making
Contribute to documentation and technical knowledge sharing

Job Requirements
Strong professional experience with Laravel (PHP) in production environments
Solid experience with React.js, TypeScript and modern JavaScript development
Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs
Good understanding of relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or similar)
Proficiency with Git and GitHub (branching strategies, pull requests, code reviews)
Practical experience using Docker in real projects
Ability to write clean, readable, and well-structured code
Experience working in a collaborative, professional software team
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Submission Guideline
Baheer Group is an excellent place to grow your career. Don't hesitate to apply. the vacant position.
Please note only short-listed candidates will be contacted for an interview.
https://jobs.baheergroup.com/jobs/BG26-018
Meanwhile: send a copy of your application to the below email while applying
vp@baheer.af

Submission Email
https://jobs.baheergroup.com/jobs/BG26-018, vp@baheer.af

details.Experience: • Solid experience with React.js, TypeScript and modern JavaScript development
details.Years of Experience: • Solid experience with React.js, TypeScript and modern JavaScript development

expiring_soon.title: IT Officer NOC Engineer - Night Shift
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary To serve as the frontline guardian of Setaragan Mutahed’s high-volume Airtime Top-Up infrastructure and StarPay EMI. This role ensures 24/7 availability of critical financial transactions and telecommunication links. You will monitor production systems, mitigate real-time payment failures, and ensure that overnight batch settlements and EMI reconciliations are processed without error, providing a seamless experience for thousands of agents and end-users. Duties and Responsibilities • Continuous Infrastructure & Transaction Monitoring: Proactively monitor core infrastructure, server health, and network links. Use approved tools to track the real-time flow of Top-Up transactions and StarPay EMI payments, identifying any latency or drops in success rates. • L1 Incident Triage & FinTech Troubleshooting: Perform immediate first-level triage on system alarms. For payment failures or "timeout" errors, collect critical evidence (API logs, transaction IDs, screenshots) and execute approved runbooks to restore service. • Critical Escalation Management: Act as the primary point of contact during the night shift. Escalate high-severity incidents (e.g., core database downtime, ISP link failure, or payment gateway outages) to on-call Tier-2 engineers or vendor support (MNOs/Banks) according to the strict Escalation Matrix. • Rigorous Ticketing & Shift Handover: Document every incident in the Jira/Ticketing system with high precision. Provide a comprehensive Morning Handover Report detailing pending issues, vendor tickets, and critical status updates to the daytime operations team. • Operational Health Checks: Conduct routine checks on server CPU/RAM, disk usage, and service statuses. Ensure all scheduled automated jobs and security backups are completed, reporting any exceptions immediately to prevent morning backlog. • Overnight Batch & EMI Reconciliation: Verify the successful execution of overnight batch reconciliation jobs between StarPay and partner banks. Manually trigger or report failures in settlement processes to ensure financial data integrity for the next business day. • Network & ISP Coordination: Support basic network troubleshooting (link down, packet loss) affecting agent connectivity. Coordinate directly with local ISPs and MNO partners (AWCC, Roshan, Etisalat, MTN, Salaam) to resolve connectivity issues affecting the Top-Up platform. • Compliance & Security Adherence: Maintain absolute confidentiality of sensitive financial and customer data. Follow strict Access Control Procedures and Zero-Change Policy—do not perform unauthorized system changes or configuration updates during the shift. Job Requirements • Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering. • Experience: 1–3 years of experience in a Network Operations Center (NOC), IT Support, or FinTech operations role. Fresh graduates with exceptional understanding of Linux/Networking and a high sense of responsibility will be considered. • Shift Flexibility: Absolute willingness to work permanent night shifts and remain alert during quiet hours to handle sudden, time-critical emergencies. Technical Skills • Networking Foundations: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, and troubleshooting tools (Ping, MTR, Traceroute, Telnet). • Systems Knowledge: Familiarity with Windows/Linux environments, basic SQL queries (for transaction lookups), and monitoring dashboards (e.g., Zabbix, Grafana, or PRTG). • FinTech Literacy: Understanding of API response codes (200, 404, 500) and the basic flow of a digital payment transaction. • Documentation: High proficiency in professional English/Local language for writing technical incident logs and handover notes. Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies • Crisis Management: Ability to remain calm and methodical when multiple systems trigger alarms simultaneously. • Sense of Ownership: A "pro-active" rather than "reactive" mindset; taking responsibility for a ticket until it is resolved or officially handed over. • Reliability: Strict punctuality and adherence to operational procedures, recognizing that StarPay’s reputation relies on 100% system uptime. • Communication: Clear, concise communication skills to explain technical issues to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders. Submission Guidelines Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 05 May, 2026 to the link provided below: Admission Link: ( https://forms.gle/jANFWERiLvYSTRwc7 ) Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

expiring_soon.title: IT Services Management Assistant
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The facility of technical support to Branches and HO users by performing remote through Telephone, Ticketing system, and Onsite support.

Duties and Responsibilities
Providing first-level support contact and conveying IT solutions to the branches and HO department’s inquiries and issues.
Properly escalate unresolved queries to the next level of IT support/Unit.
Track, Route, and redirect problems to correct IT resources.
Ensure to Keep updating users/requesters’ Tickets on the Ticketing system.
Walk users through problem-solving processes.
Follow up with users/requesters to provide feedback and see problems through a proper resolution.
Utilize better user service skills and exceed customer’s/requester’s expectations.
Ensure proper recording, documentation, and closures of the reports are in place.
Any other identical tasks assigned by the respective supervisor/s.

Job Requirements
A university degree in IT field or Computer Sciences fields.
A minimum of 2 years’ experience in IT troubleshooting or functional role.
Ability to communicate, written and orally, in English and Dari/Pashto.
Ability to work in a systematic and well-organized manner, with technical skills.
Ability to have IT Troubleshooting, Computer Configurations, and Hardware repair skills.
Ability to Travel in Fields/Provinces where FMFB operates.

Submission Guidelines
If you meet the above requirements, we are encouraging you to apply for this position. Please send us your CV along with a cover letter via email at ( vacancies@fmfb.com.af ).
Please make sure that your email includes the vacancy ID as the subject line.
Note that, only the candidates who are meeting the requirements of the position will be shortlisted.
For more information, Please visit our website: https://www.fmfb.com.af/jobs/it-services-management-assistant/

expiring_soon.title: Specialist IT Security
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary Specialist IT Security with Etisalat Afghanistan. Duties and Responsibilities • Monitor and analyze network traffic, system activities, and security events to detect potential intrusions, attacks, or vulnerabilities. • Respond to, investigate, and remediate security incidents, ensuring timely resolution and proper escalation where required. • Perform regular risk assessments, vulnerability assessments, and security audits to identify and mitigate potential risks. • Conduct penetration testing and security validation exercises to proactively identify weaknesses in systems, applications, and network infrastructure. • Prepare detailed incident reports, root cause analyses, and recommendations for continuous improvement. • Manage, maintain, and troubleshoot security infrastructure, including firewalls, VPN (SSL/IPsec), encryption systems, DMZ environments, and endpoint protection solutions. • Monitor endpoints using EDR and NDR solutions to detect, analyze, and respond to advanced threats. • Utilize SIEM & SOAR platforms for log monitoring, correlation, and threat detection. • Monitor and secure Active Directory and identity systems using relevant security tools. • Administer and support security solutions such as NAC, PAM, and IAM, including daily operations and troubleshooting. • Integrate network devices and servers (Linux/Windows) with SIEM and other centralized security platforms. • Collaborate with internal teams and attend technical sessions to ensure alignment of security operations and initiatives. • Support the implementation and follow-up of cybersecurity projects and initiatives across the organization. • Promote security awareness by guiding and training staff on cybersecurity best practices. • Stay updated with the latest cybersecurity threats, vulnerabilities, and technologies to enhance the organization’s security posture. • Perform any additional tasks assigned by management in line with organizational objectives. Job Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field, with at least four years of relevant experience preferred. Submission Guidelines To apply for this vacancy, please use the following link: https://careers.etisalat.af/ Kindly use Google Chrome Browser for smooth access. For further information, please contact us via WhatsApp at +93 (0) 788 887 363.

expiring_soon.title: MSupply/Data entry assistant
expiring_soon.description:
About MHCO
Maihan Humanitarian Convergence Organization (MHCO) is a national non-government, non-political, and non-profit organization registered with the Ministry of Economy, committed to delivering humanitarian services across Afghanistan. MHCO focuses on various sectors including Health, Education, Protection, Nutrition, Livelihoods, Food Security, and Organizational Development.

Job Description
he MSupply/Data Entry Assistant supports the pharmacy department by ensuring accurate and timely entry of stock data into the mSupply system, maintaining proper inventory records, and assisting with reporting, stock monitoring, and documentation. The role contributes to efficient pharmaceutical supply management and ensures compliance with organizational procedures.
Duties and Responsibilities:
Accurately enter and update pharmaceutical data in the mSupply system , including stock receipts, issues, adjustments, and transfers.
Maintain up-to-date records of medicines and medical supplies in both physical and electronic systems.
Verify and cross-check data with stock cards, bin cards, and delivery notes to ensure accuracy.
Monitor stock levels and report low stock, expiries, and discrepancies to the supervisor.
Assist in preparing stock reports, consumption reports, and inventory summaries on a regular basis.
Ensure proper documentation and filing of all pharmacy records, including invoices, waybills, and stock reports.
Support the pharmacy team during stock counts, physical inventory, and audits.
Maintain confidentiality and integrity of all data entered into the system.
Coordinate with warehouse and pharmacy staff to ensure timely data entry of all transactions.
Identify and report any inconsistencies or errors in the system promptly.
Assist in ensuring compliance with organizational policies and donor requirements related to pharmacy and inventory management.
Perform any other related tasks assigned by the supervisor.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Health Sciences, Computer Science , Business Administration, or a related field.
At least 2 –3 years of relevant experience in data entry, pharmacy, or supply chain/warehouse management.
Familiarity with mSupply system or other inventory management software is preferred.
Good knowledge of pharmaceutical products and stock management practices.
Strong data entry skills with high attention to accuracy and detail.
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word) .
Ability to maintain organized records and documentation.
Good communication and coordination skills.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
Understanding of basic reporting and documentation procedures.
Knowledge of English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is required.
Strong sense of integrity, confidentiality, and accountability.
Safeguarding and Recruitment Statement – MHCO
At MHCO, we are firmly committed to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive working environment. We do not tolerate any form of inappropriate behaviour, including sexual harassment, exploitation, abuse, or financial misconduct. The safety and well-being of children, young people, adults, and all beneficiaries we engage with are of paramount importance.
All MHCO staff are expected to uphold these principles in accordance with our Code of Conduct and safeguarding policies. We place strong emphasis on recruiting individuals who demonstrate integrity and align with our organizational values.
The selected candidate for this role will receive comprehensive safeguarding training and will be responsible for understanding and adhering to MHCO’s safeguarding standards. Employment offers are subject to satisfactory references and relevant screening checks, which may include criminal background verification and terrorism finance assessments.
we will request information from previous employers regarding any substantiated findings of sexual exploitation, abuse, or harassment, as well as any ongoing investigations at the time of the candidate’s departure.
By submitting an application, candidates confirm their understanding and acceptance of these recruitment procedures .

Submission Guideline
The interested candidate should submit their complete application (CV/Cover letter) through the link provided below.
Note: Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for written Test/Interview
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

tech_banking_jobs.title: Chief Information Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
